# Cell Layer Positions

**API Collection**

Optional positioning of additional layers displayed with the cell. Used by the [doc://com.apple.quartz/documentation/Quartz/IKImageBrowserCell/layer(forType:)] method.

## Constants

- **IKImageBrowserCellBackgroundLayer**: Layer displayed in the background.
- **IKImageBrowserCellForegroundLayer**: Layer displayed in the foreground.
- **IKImageBrowserCellSelectionLayer**: Layer displayed as the selection.
- **IKImageBrowserCellPlaceHolderLayer**: Layer displayed as a placeholder when an image is not yet available.

## Constants

- **IKImageBrowserCellState**: The possible states for the browser cell. These values are used by the [doc://com.apple.quartz/documentation/Quartz/IKImageBrowserCell/cellState()] method.
